title: Villager Reroller
description: Breaks and replaces lectern blocks to find any book you desire!
body:
# Villager Trade Roller

Villager Trade Roller automates the tedious process of rerolling villager librarian trades, allowing you to quickly search for the exact enchanted books and prices you want without repeatedly breaking and replacing lecterns manually.

The mod automatically cycles villager trades and can stop once a matching enchantment or price requirement is found, making villager trading far less time-consuming and frustrating.

## Features

* Automatically rerolls librarian trades
* Search for specific enchanted books
* Optional price filtering
* Fast trade cycling
* Simple and lightweight
* Designed for survival-friendly villager setups
* Client-side automation focused on convenience
* Settings in the mod "Mod Menu" Necessary mod!

## Why Use This Mod?

Finding good librarian trades in vanilla Minecraft can take hundreds of lectern resets and a large amount of time. This mod removes the repetitive part of the process while still preserving normal villager mechanics.

Perfect for:

* Survival players
* Technical Minecraft players
* SMP servers
* Enchantment-focused progression
* Players who dislike repetitive villager grinding

## Compatibility

* Minecraft Java Edition 26.1.2

## Notes

This mod does not add new enchantments or modify villager trade balance. It simply automates the existing rerolling process already present in vanilla Minecraft.
